name: part_004
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_004.webm

scenes.description: MC segment featuring Vestia Zeta, Kaela Kovalskia, and Kobo Kanaeru interacting with the audience.

subtitles.original: はいよ ゼータが怒ると怖いからね
subtitles.english: Alright, because Zeta's scary when she's angry.

subtitles.original: Enggak, bukan.
subtitles.english: No, it's not.

subtitles.original: Tapi kalau Zeta udah ngomong...
subtitles.english: But if Zeta has already spoken...

subtitles.original: Takut kan?
subtitles.english: Scary, right?

subtitles.original: もういいや ゼータがカメラを独り占めしちゃダメっていうのは…うーん、しょうがない
subtitles.english: Fine, Zeta said I can't hog the camera... well, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, udah deh.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, fine.

subtitles.original: Kalau enggak boleh rebutan kamera sama Zeta,
subtitles.english: If I'm not allowed to fight for the camera with Zeta,

subtitles.original: mmm... shoganai.
subtitles.english: mmm... it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: ファンのみんなと遊ぼう！さっきみんなからも大きな声もらってたわけだし、今度はこっちがみんなに大きな声をだしたいっす！
subtitles.english: Let's play with the fans! Since we got a lot of loud cheers from everyone earlier, now I want us to shout back at everyone!

subtitles.original: Kita main aja deh sama penonton-chan.
subtitles.english: Let's just play with Penonton-chan.

subtitles.original: Kobo pengen deh coba kita teriakin penonton, karena kan tadi mereka sudah teriakin kita.
subtitles.english: Kobo wants us to try shouting at the audience, because they already shouted at us earlier.

subtitles.original: はいはいはい！ そうっすよ、カエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah yeah! That's right, don't worry, it won't be as long as Kaela's streaming hours.

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, iya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: Maksudnya, kita teriakin intro kita bareng penonton-tachi.
subtitles.english: I mean, let's shout our intro together with the audience.

subtitles.original: Betul!
subtitles.english: Exactly!

subtitles.original:
そう！みんなにじゃなく、みんなとね
そうそう！そういうことっす！
subtitles.english:
Yeah! Not 'at' everyone, but 'with' everyone.
Yeah yeah! That's it!

subtitles.original: Teriaknya bareng penonton, jangan teriakin penontonnya.
subtitles.english: Shout with the audience, don't shout at the audience.

subtitles.original: Iya, gitu maksudnya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's what I meant.

subtitles.original: だってこれから歌わなきゃいけないからまず声を温存しなきゃでしょ？
subtitles.english: Because we have to sing after this, so we should save our voices first, right?

subtitles.original: Soalnya kan habis ini kita harus nyanyi,
subtitles.english: Because we have to sing after this,

subtitles.original: jadi kita harus simpen suara dulu enggak sih?
subtitles.english: so shouldn't we save our voices first?

subtitles.original: そうっすよ、カエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: That's right, don't worry, it won't be as long as Kaela's streaming hours.

subtitles.original: Betul ya. Enggak bakal sama itu, tenang aja
subtitles.english: That's right. It won't be that long, don't worry,

subtitles.original: enggak bakal selama durasi stream Kaela gitu ya guys ya.
subtitles.english: it won't be as long as Kaela's stream duration, okay guys?

subtitles.original: まあいい 大声出していいから好きにして
subtitles.english: Well fine, you can shout as much as you want, so go ahead.

subtitles.original: Ya udahlah, mau teriak-teriak, ya udah.
subtitles.english: Well whatever, if you want to shout, fine.

subtitles.original: Aku enggak masalah lah, aku ikut.
subtitles.english: I don't mind, I'm in.

subtitles.original: みんな準備はいいかな？
subtitles.english: Is everyone ready?

subtitles.original: Gimana nih semuanya, udah siap belum?
subtitles.english: How about it everyone, are you ready yet?

subtitles.original: Siap enggak?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: もう出来てるのかよ！っね！じゃあここから！
subtitles.english: Are you already ready?! Right! Then from here!

subtitles.original: Siap nih kayaknya. Oke, Kobo dulu ya.
subtitles.english: Seems like they're ready. Okay, Kobo's turn first.

subtitles.original: 一緒に「BOKOBOKOBOKO!」って叫ぼう！よろしくよ！
subtitles.english: Let's shout "BOKOBOKOBOKO!" together! Let's go!

subtitles.original: Aku mau kita sama-sama teriak: 'BOKOBOKOBOKO!'.
subtitles.english: I want us to shout together: "BOKOBOKOBOKO!".

subtitles.original: Oke? Siap ya?
subtitles.english: Okay? Ready?

subtitles.original: いち、に、さん！
subtitles.english: One, two, three!

subtitles.original: BOKOBOKOBOKO!
subtitles.english: BOKOBOKOBOKO!

subtitles.original: いいわねいいわね！次はゼータ！
subtitles.english: Nice, nice! Next is Zeta!

subtitles.original: Seka-seka! Giliran Zeta,
subtitles.english: Nice, nice! Zeta's turn,

subtitles.original: giliran Zeta.
subtitles.english: Zeta's turn.

subtitles.original: 「ミッションスタート！」って言ったら一緒に「スタート！」って言うわね！
subtitles.english: When I say "Mission Start!", you all shout "Start!" together, okay?

subtitles.original: Pas aku bilang 'Mission Start-o',
subtitles.english: When I say "Mission Start-o",

subtitles.original: kalian bareng-bareng teriak 'Start-o' ya.
subtitles.english: you all shout "Start-o" together, okay?

subtitles.original: いい？アアア！ミッション...
subtitles.english: Ready? Ahh! Mission...

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: START!

subtitles.original: 次はカエラ！
subtitles.english: Next is Kaela!

subtitles.original: Oke, habis ini Kaela.
subtitles.english: Okay, next is Kaela.

subtitles.original:
よしよし！きてみんは、そしてholoh3roも
「holoh3ro!」って言ったら「HU-HA!」で返してね！簡単でしょ？
subtitles.english:
Alright! Kitemin, and holoh3ro too.
When I say "holoh3ro!", respond with "HU-HA!" Easy, right?

subtitles.original: Nih ya buat semua penonton sama Holohiro juga,
subtitles.english: Alright, for all the audience and Holohiro too,

subtitles.original: kalau misalnya aku bilang 'Holohiro!',
subtitles.english: if I say "Holohiro!",

subtitles.original: kalian bilang 'Hu-Ha!'. Gampang kan?
subtitles.english: you say "Hu-Ha!". Easy, right?

subtitles.original: さあさあさあ！準備はいい？ holoh3ro!
subtitles.english: Come on, come on! Are you ready? holoh3ro!

subtitles.original: Langsung, langsung, langsung.
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, come on.

subtitles.original: Oke ya, siap ya. Holohiro!
subtitles.english: Okay, ready. Holohiro!

subtitles.original: HU-HA!
subtitles.english: HU-HA!

subtitles.original: いいわねいいわね！
subtitles.english: Nice, nice!

subtitles.original: Mantap, mantap!
subtitles.english: Great, great!

subtitles.original:
いいわ、ついに3期生は息ぴったり
そうね、まだまだ元気が余りそうだわ
subtitles.english:
Nice, Gen 3 is finally in sync.
Yeah, looks like there's still plenty of energy left.

subtitles.original: Keren-keren-keren.
subtitles.english: Cool, cool, cool.

subtitles.original: Akhirnya Gen 3 kompak juga.
subtitles.english: Finally, Gen 3 is in sync.

subtitles.original: Iya kompak kelihatannya, masih pada semangat nih ya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, looks in sync, everyone's still energetic.

subtitles.original:
だって、今日の一曲目だよ。でももうすごく伝わってくるんだもん
みんなまさか私たちの1曲目が「100%」だなんて思ってた？
subtitles.english:
Because it was our first song today. But it already resonates so much.
Did everyone expect our first song to be "100%"?

subtitles.original: Soalnya dari lagu pertama kita hari ini aja udah kerasa banget.
subtitles.english: Because from our first song today, it already felt so strong.

subtitles.original: Kalian tuh pada nyangka enggak sih
subtitles.english: Did you guys expect

subtitles.original: kalau lagu pertama kita tuh bakal '100%'?
subtitles.english: that our first song would be "100%"?

subtitles.original:
思うわけないよな。私もびっくりした
ホシノヴァ気分でライブ開始だなんて！すごいいよね？
subtitles.english:
No way. I was surprised too.
Starting the live with a Hoshinova vibe! Amazing, right?

subtitles.original: Mana ada yang nyangka,
subtitles.english: No one would have expected that,

subtitles.original: aku aja sendiri enggak nyangka juga.
subtitles.english: even I didn't expect it.

subtitles.original: Langsung dibuka dengan 'Hoshinova mode' gitu,
subtitles.english: Starting right off with "Hoshinova mode" like that,

subtitles.original: keren banget kan.
subtitles.english: it was so cool, right?

subtitles.original: やばい！
subtitles.english: Crazy!

subtitles.original: Asik, asik.
subtitles.english: Nice, nice.

subtitles.original:
かっこいいっすね。しかもさっきゼータと…いや違う
ゼータとカエラが歌った時はもう本家の「100%」みたいっす
subtitles.english:
It was so cool. Especially when Zeta and... wait no.
When Zeta and Kaela sang, it was just like the original "100%".

subtitles.original: Keren banget sih, apalagi tadi
subtitles.english: It was really cool, especially earlier

subtitles.original: Zeta sama nyanyi... Zeta sama nyanyi.
subtitles.english: when Zeta sang... Zeta sang.

subtitles.original: Zeta sama Kaela nyanyi '100%'
subtitles.english: Zeta and Kaela singing "100%"

subtitles.original: tuh udah kayak real '100%' ya.
subtitles.english: was like the real "100%".

subtitles.original:
マジかっこよすぎなんだけど、なんか, うーっ！ってなってっさ！
あんんなにかっこいい歌を歌ったことあるのかな？
subtitles.english:
It was seriously too cool, I was like "Uhh!"!
I wonder if they've ever sung such a cool song before?

subtitles.original: Itu tuh bisa enggak sih, enggak sekeren tadi?
subtitles.english: Could you not be that cool?

subtitles.original: Aku tuh jadi pengen kayak... 'Uh! Uh!' gitu kan.
subtitles.english: I felt like... "Uh! Uh!" like that.

subtitles.original: Kalian pernah enggak sih nyanyi lagu sekeren tadi?
subtitles.english: Have you guys ever sung a song as cool as that?

subtitles.original: かっこつけてんの？
subtitles.english: Are you acting cool?

subtitles.original: Aura farming ya.
subtitles.english: Aura farming, huh.

subtitles.original:
そう、かっこつけてる。本物のかっこつけ
だってムーナの曲かっこいいもん
subtitles.english:
Yeah, acting cool. Real cool guys.
Because Moona's song is so cool.

subtitles.original: Aura farming sesungguhnya.
subtitles.english: Real aura farming.

subtitles.original: Keren banget emang lagunya Moona.
subtitles.english: Moona's song is indeed very cool.

subtitles.original:
だってゼータがいつもスタイリッシュとかジャズっぽい曲ばっかだしよ？
だからさっき「100%」を歌った時、めっちゃ雰囲気が違う
subtitles.english:
Because Zeta usually does stylish or jazz-like songs?
So when you sang "100%" earlier, the vibe was totally different.

subtitles.original: Emang, kan Zeta kan soalnya biasanya lagu-lagu
subtitles.english: Indeed, because Zeta usually does songs

subtitles.original: yang stylish, yang jazzy-jazzy gitu.
subtitles.english: that are stylish, jazzy.

subtitles.original: Jadi tadi pas dinyanyiin tuh ya '100%',
subtitles.english: So when you sang "100%" earlier,

subtitles.original: rasanya jadi beda banget vibe-nya.
subtitles.english: the vibe felt totally different.

subtitles.original: しかもカエラのラップも！
subtitles.english: And Kaela's rap too!

subtitles.original: Terus Kaela juga tadi ngerap ya.
subtitles.english: And then Kaela was rapping too.

subtitles.original: Tadatadatada... kayak apa itu?
subtitles.english: Kobo imitating the rap sounds.

subtitles.original:
とにかくかっこよかった！すごいわ！
でも、それだけじゃないよ！次の曲が「NEWzOMBIE!!」でした！
subtitles.english:
Anyway, it was cool! Amazing!
But that's not all! The next song was "NEWzOMBIE!!".

subtitles.original: Iya, pokoknya keren banget,
subtitles.english: Yeah, anyway it was so cool,

subtitles.original: keren banget ya tadi.
subtitles.english: really cool earlier.

subtitles.original: Tapi habis ini tuh masih ada lagi, 'NEWzOMBIE!!'.
subtitles.english: But after this, there's still more, "NEWzOMBIE!!".

subtitles.original:
これだれの曲かわかるよね？
もちろんっだよ、うちの先輩だ
subtitles.english:
You know whose song this is, right?
Of course, it's our senior's.

subtitles.original: Ayo, pada tahu dong ini lagu siapa.
subtitles.english: Come on, you guys should know whose song this is.

subtitles.original: Tahu lah, tahu lah, senpai kita, senpai kita.
subtitles.english: Of course, of course, our senior, our senior.

subtitles.original:
holoroのパフォーマンスもめっちゃかっこよかったよ。まるでゲームの中にいるみたいだった
そうっわ！しかもバックダンサーもいたし
subtitles.english:
holoro's performance was also really cool. It felt like being in a game.
Right! And there were back dancers too.

subtitles.original: Tadi tuh itu ya, Holoro tuh perform-nya
subtitles.english: Earlier, Holoro's performance

subtitles.original: juga keren banget kayak lagi di game gitu.
subtitles.english: was also really cool, like being in a game.

subtitles.original: Betul, setuju. Terus tadi ada back dancer-nya men.
subtitles.english: Exactly, I agree. And there were back dancers, man.

subtitles.original: かっこよかったっすね！
subtitles.english: It was cool, right!

subtitles.original: Keren ya guys, keren enggak?
subtitles.english: It was cool, right guys? Wasn't it cool?

subtitles.original: かっこいい！他になんかあったかな？レーザーも花火も…と
subtitles.english: Cool! What else was there? Lasers, fireworks... and so on.

subtitles.original: Keren! Ada apa lagi tuh tadi? Lampu laser,
subtitles.english: Cool! What else was there? Laser lights,

subtitles.original: terus ada efek kembang api segala.
subtitles.english: and then firework effects and everything.

subtitles.original: すごいギミックがたくさんあったっすわ！
subtitles.english: There were a lot of amazing gimmicks!

subtitles.original: Terus banyak lah ya gimmick-gimmick yang wow.
subtitles.english: And there were a lot of wow gimmicks.

subtitles.original: あのバックダンサーたちあたしのソロライブに雇うっす
subtitles.english: I'm gonna hire those back dancers for my solo live.

subtitles.original: Itu back dancer nanti aku hire semua ya buat solo konser aku.
subtitles.english: I'm gonna hire those back dancers for my solo concert.

subtitles.original: おっと、もうソロライブの話？
subtitles.english: Whoa, talking about solo lives already?

subtitles.original: Wah, udah ngomong solo konser aja.
subtitles.english: Whoa, talking about a solo concert already.

subtitles.original: まあ言葉も祈りってやつ
subtitles.english: Well, words are like prayers.

subtitles.original: Ya omongan adalah doa ya.
subtitles.english: Well, words are prayers.

subtitles.original: でもこのライブはまだ終わらないよ！まだあと！
subtitles.english: But this live isn't over yet! There's still more!

subtitles.original: Tapi konser yang ini belum selesai.
subtitles.english: But this concert isn't over yet.

subtitles.original: Belum, belum, belum.
subtitles.english: Not yet, not yet.

subtitles.original: でも…さっき何の歌を歌ったか知ってる？
subtitles.english: But... do you know what song we sang just now?

subtitles.original: Eh tapi, kalian tahu enggak sih
subtitles.english: But wait, do you guys know

subtitles.original: sebelum ini tuh nyanyinya lagu apa?
subtitles.english: what song was sung before this?

subtitles.original: もちろんっだよ。私の新しい曲だから
subtitles.english: Of course. Because it's my new song.

subtitles.original: Ets, aku mah tahu banget lah,
subtitles.english: Heh, I definitely know,

subtitles.original: itu lagu terbaru aku. Dahlah.
subtitles.english: it's my newest song. "Dahlah".

subtitles.original: そうっすね。まあいいや。まあいい
subtitles.english: Right. Well anyway. Fine.

subtitles.original: Iya, udah, enggak usah dibahas.
subtitles.english: Yeah, fine, no need to discuss it.

subtitles.original: Dahlah.
subtitles.english: Whatever.

subtitles.original: いやいや！タイトルは「dahlah.」だよ！「dahlah.」！
subtitles.english: No no! The title is "dahlah."! "dahlah."!

subtitles.original: Lho kok gitu? Itu tuh maksudnya judulnya Dahlah,
subtitles.english: Hey, why like that? I meant the title is "Dahlah",

subtitles.original: lagunya judulnya Dahlah.
subtitles.english: the song title is "Dahlah".

subtitles.original:
おおなるほど
「dahlah.」だったか…まあわざとだったけど
「dahlah.」だったか。先に言ってよ！
subtitles.english:
Oh, I see.
It was "dahlah."... well, it was on purpose.
It was "dahlah.". You should've said so first!

subtitles.original: Ooh, dahlah... ya dahlah.
subtitles.english: Ooh, dahlah... yeah, dahlah.

subtitles.original: Bilang dong. Sengaja sih.
subtitles.english: You should've said so. I was doing it on purpose.

subtitles.original: だっていつもそれ言ってるじゃん。本当に「まあいいや」って思ってた
subtitles.english: Because you're always saying that. I thought it really meant "whatever".

subtitles.original: Habisnya kamu kan sering 'dahlah, dahlah' gitu, jadi dikira emang beneran dahlah.
subtitles.english: Because you often say "dahlah, dahlah" like that, so I thought it was really just "dahlah" [whatever].

subtitles.original: それ言って帰ると思ってた。いやいや、かわいそうだから
subtitles.english: I thought you'd say that and go home. No no, that's sad.

subtitles.original: Entar dahlah, dahlah, pulang dia.
subtitles.english: Next thing you know, she says "dahlah, dahlah" and goes home.

subtitles.original: Jangan nanti, kasihan nanti dia.
subtitles.english: Don't, poor her.

subtitles.original: じゃあ「dahlah.」ってどういう意味？
subtitles.english: So what does "dahlah." mean?

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu, dahlah tuh maksudnya apa sih?
subtitles.english: So what does "dahlah" mean anyway?

subtitles.original:
人生はしょうがないって意味
人生は重いから「まあいいや」って言えばいいだけ
そのあと人生を続けようって意味
subtitles.english:
It means life is what it is.
Life is heavy, so you just say "whatever".
And then it means to keep going with life.

subtitles.original: Dahlah sama kehidupan. Hidup tuh berat ya guys ya.
subtitles.english: Done with life. Life is heavy, guys.

subtitles.original: Kalau hidup berat ya udah dahlah aja, habis itu lanjutkan hidupmu.
subtitles.english: If life is heavy, just say "dahlah", and then continue your life.

subtitles.original: そうっすね。大人になったらね
subtitles.english: Right. Once you've grown up.

subtitles.original: Iya betul teman-teman di kehidupan yang dewasa ini ya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's right friends, in this adult life.
